The following events took place in '''1003 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*[[Darth Bane/Legends|Dessel]], later known as the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] Darth Bane, joins the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] army.<ref name="PoD">''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]''</ref>
